review_text:
Brilliant little park. Gem of a location. 10ks from town and completely secure grounds.
Reception people are fantastic, no waiting. Thankyou for the welcome 🤗.
Cost of site was surprisingly good, pleasantly surprised.

We were put right beside the toilet and Camp kitchen, don't mind the site.
Very neat and tidy amenities and park.
Well done guys 👍👍
A little outside Townsville but good site with very good facilities.
Fantastic little hideaway holiday park that offers friendly service and clean, functional vans with all the facilities you need. Perfect for a single traveller or a couple. Quiet location.
Always stay here when our Ute is to get serviced. The park has changed this time for the better. Great staff and the park looks amazing. Will definitely always be back.

Nice, quiet, spacious park. Unlike the nearby competition. Staff are very friendly and helpful.

Lots of shady trees. Guests seem nice.

Swimming pool isn't constantly full of kids.

Amenities need a bit of a make over, but great water pressure and nice all the same.

Almost no noise from the nearby highway.

Close to Fairfield Shopping Centre.

Hope the rest of our stay is just as nice, we're sure.

Loved it. Close to almost everything, quick run on the ring road to anything else. Site 40. Oct to Nov 2025. Fantastic staff, great amenities. Moved on to follow work. Know where I'm staying when I'm back that way.

We didn’t expect luxury given the style of cabin booked, however we were disappointed with the level of maintenance. On arrival, there was a police presence and a message advising guests to secure valuables and lock doors and windows. While we understand these things can happen anywhere, we did find it difficult to properly secure our cabin due to the condition of the door, which appeared quite aged and water damaged. The locks were also difficult to use and the door itself seemed overdue for replacement.

We continued with our stay, however the bathroom did not appear to have been cleaned thoroughly, and there were some noticeable oversights. The bed was also quite uncomfortable, which ultimately led us to checkout early, forgo our second prepaid night and seek alternative accommodation.

Overall, the facilities would benefit from some general maintenance and a more thorough clean, including the pool area.

On a positive note, the laundry facilities were convenient and we appreciated the option for electronic payments and the cycle reminders.

Note: It is disappointing to see that issues with this specific cabin have been raised previously, yet no apparent action has been taken to address them.

I stayed here for 4 nights as I was in Townsville for the state age netball comp. The van home was excellent, very clean, comfortable and had everything I needed. It was extremely quiet and I slept like a log. I hired a moped to get to and from the netball courts and Uber’s to take me to dinner. The swimming pool was clean and a great way to cool off each afternoon. All in all a great stay with very helpful staff.

Booked on line. With a message of our large size. They gave us a fantastic caravan site with plenty of room for our large tow vehicles (brand new) to be parked safely beside us. Slight highway noise which quietly comes more insignificant as the night goes on. Fantastic swimming pool. Very quiet in general. Only couple of permanents. Definitely best described as peaceful holiday park and very relaxing

Arrived late at the site and had to call the after-hours. The lady was polite and attended to us speedily and we were soon at our cabin.

Cabin was clean, very clean and well suited for our stay purpose. The water runs well, airconditioning was excellent and the linens were sparkling white.
The park was virtually noiseless and we enjoyed our stay.

We requested for replacement linens which were courteously provided . We did not use the cooking facilities provided in the cabin as we ate out mostly.

There was almost nothing to complain of, except that the facility is a bit out of town. Tgat said, having your own transport solves that easily.

Was not aware of the free WiFi till the last few hours of our stay but logged into it and the speed was fairly decent.

Pricing was fair, given what other properties were charging.

The Staff & Management here are exceeded my expectations! They are helpful & exceptional humans! After days of exiting our rental tired & exhausted the bed was up there with the best motels I have stayed at! Shower powerful & the icing on the cake the lack of sirens and traffic noise! Manicured gardens and a lovely pool!
Yes it's a few minutes from town, however the overall quiet is "Priceless" Our Pet friendly room was absolutely spotless with zero pet smell!
Despite the cabin being "Older" It was with in my budget had everything we needed decent aircon and really decent beds!
The management here are approachable and I will now chose Big 4 based on this first experience! I'm travelling with a 13 old and embarking on a long trip south so recouping my energy was needed, Thanxs to Troy & staff for being "Exceptional Humans"
The shower was excellent , the bed is just so comfortable . Congrats to the staff for a top job .

We had a wonderful stay at this holiday park. The staff were incredibly friendly, the rooms were clean and well equipped, and when our shower started leaking they upgraded us straight away with no fuss. Fantastic service and a great experience overall. Would definitely recommend!

I stayed 1 night in room 117, the sheets were dirty, the air conditioner is full of mould, floors sticky and dirty, door barely closed and locked, waiting on a refund, doubt I shall receive now looking at past negative reviews which I will take further action. Will not be staying here again and will let others know as well.

Me quedé las dos últimas noches del año y feliz de haberme alojado ahí. Está un poco apartado y solo hay una carretera de acceso. La recepción y salida super bien y gente super maja. la cabaña estaba súper bien equipada, espaciosa, camas cómodas, y con detalles como el café que se agradecen. Tienen de todo para cocinar, se ve bastante bien cuidado y los espacios comunes también en buen estado. Hay un montón de animales en la zona y las reglas que tienen se cumplen, no como en otros sitios de este estilo que pasan fino de que la gente respete. Mis dieces
No good, electricity was down, floor was not clean, old cabins, cheap prices,friendly staff, pool was on maintenance
We always stay here when visiting Townsville. Big grassy sites as well as the usual slabs etc. Clean amenities and easy access to north and south highway. Only $30 a night great value
Constant harassment from park management.
Paid for 3 days power, 3rd day, PLANNED power outage.  We had to leave as medical equipment required power. Weren't told until after office closed the night before.  NO REFUND FOR 3RD DAY.  NOT HAPPY
Glad i read the reviews first..... I wont be booking here
Not very happy the Manager didnt get back to me at all. Manager didn't give my money back because I had surgery on my x4 Wisdom teeth couldn't go had alot of proof
We stayed out the back was nice and quiet camp kitchen clean amenities

This park was a little different, it had the powered slab sites and cabins and then it had a enormous powered and unpowered grass sites. These individual sites were very big  including drive thru sites and big rig sites. Mango tree around the perimeter of the park , but very little shade on the big grass sites. A big thanks for letting us set up on the big rig site while our car was at Ford for repairs. Big clean amenities,  $7 for washing machines- paid by card.
Good budget accommodation, friendly staff 👌

We stayed there for 4 nights, it was pretty good, the location is good but it is little bit noisy because of construction work plus pretty close to the highway so we hear the trucks drive pass, I thought the curlew would be annoying but technically they went that annoying.

The services was really good, they helped us and they are really helpful 😀 👍

The place we set up camp was amazing, near the toilets plus Block A was really good, had everything you need so well  done, hope to come here again

Rooms 5/5
Service 5/5
Location 4.8/5

Booked 2 nights here as we have been here before which was a nice park.  We needed to pack up caravan to go to storage before retuning to NZ for a few months.|Upon arrival we were advised to make sure things were packed away and locked as they have a lot of opportunist criminals come through.|Also advised that the pool was unavailable for the afternoon.|Went to do washing the next morning  (as we had to vacuum pack all the linen) and there was no power.  The power had been cut at 8.30.  I got a message at 9 to say the power was out from 8.30 to 2.30.  No mention of this planned outage upon check in. Laundry cost $7 for a wash and $7 for the dryer.|Pool was also still out the following day apparently due to power outage.|The showers were clean but very shabby.  No soap in toilets and according to another guest they had not been cleaned or had soap in the previous 4 days they had been at park.|The boom gates are not working and have not been for months now.|This park is looking very tied and I unmaintained.|When I approached the manager about a partial credit all he could do was advised they have had 4 managers in 4 months and he had only been there 4 days.  Would not respond to txt or email re the credit.|Would not stay there again!
Great place to start prices are reasonable

Overpriced for what they give you. Every time you come they change the price (almost 40 for unpowered!). Laundry is a rip off as well (7$!!), and they are not polite. We had a change of plan and we had to leave a day earlier and they didn't give us a refund. That has never happened to us before. Disgusting service!!

This is a good holiday park with lots of cabins and plenty of caravan sites
It’s a bit out of town but convenient for access to the main highway
There are quite a lot of shady spots near the creek although these have crocodile warning signs
The amenities are well maintained and the laundry is good
We have stayed there twice and will do so again if in the area
Pool was down the entire visit which was school holidays. Seems to be a low Big4. Bins were always full. Most expensive laundry in the country. Wouldn't recommend

Good value for money caravan park.  Generous sized sites.
Facilities are a bit tired but plenty of hot water and good pressure.  Big shopping centre just 5 minutes away in the car and town centre can be reached in just over 10 minutes.  Some sites are rather too close to the Bruce Highway and would be noisy but we were well away.  Staff are friendly and helpful and a big effort is made to keep sites green even during extended dry periods.  This is Townsville, so keeping the car and van secure, especially at night, is a must.  However, plenty of things to do and see around Townsville.

Our neighbour had their car stolen at about 4am today. This left a bad impression of the place. The thrives also entered our caravan and took shopping bags which they dumped outside while we slept. Thank God they didn't find our keys.

My suggestion would be to keep driving and find another accommodation. The camp grounds seemed adequate but if you're wanting a cabin I wouldn't advise booking here. I could've overlooked the the age and general disrepair of the cabin, but the cleanliness was also lacking.
Floor was dirty and sticky, and I even stood on small sharp objects in the dark in the middle of the night.
Strong sewerage smell coming from bathroom taps and shower.
Broken boom gate also left me with security concerns which did not aid my sleep. Neither did the old squeaky metal bedframe.
At $170/night it was definitely a let down, I wish I had kept going further into the city to find better accommodation.

We had a very big site for our caravan
Close to a highway but didn’t notice much road noise
10km out of Townsville CBD got a bit waring but not a big deal
Overall it was a good place to stay

Parked under one of the magnificent mango trees many small mangoes some walnut size & others like Brazil nut size that fell on the roof of van at night. Very funny no complaints though but would be nice to be made aware  the 1st night scared the hubby & I. Great place to chill out.
See my 📫
Close to Hyway but didn't annoy us. Easy access to city.

I actually really like this park , it’s not expensive and quiet with lots room. The young man  Corey in reception  was Gorgious he was so kind and friendly and worth his weight in gold. Think we will come back next year. Stay longer!!!

Located 10 minutes out of the city and The Strand. Very neat park with clean facilities. Our stay was very good and it was nice and quiet. Shopping centre with everything you need is a 5 minute drive. Great location and yes we would stay here again.

Nice Park & Staff, but amenities dirty.|Over a bust weekend of the V8s their continued to have no paper towel in either Block A or B amenities.|The communal area in Block B was dirty although they had a musician playing in the afternoon, very embarrassing for the people staying there as we felt very sorry for the gentleman.|Block B also has holes in the roof of the female toilet, which was very dangerous  when the rain came pouring through.|They have nice new washing machines, which were absolutely filthy & they expected people to pay $7 a load.|Swimming pool was clean, but freezing even for us from the southern parts.|Look elsewhere, you can do better for your money.

De camping ligt naast de snelweg en je hoort dus ook de gehele dag en nacht het geluid hiervan. Het zwembad grenst echt bijna direct aan de snelweg en heeft daarom niet echt de rustige experience. Veel long stay mensen en iedereen staat vrij dicht op elkaar, vooral op het veld aan de achterzijde van de camping.

Het washok is gedateerd maar de douches hadden krachtige stralen. Groot pluspunt is dat er bij de dames een babybadje is, naast de wastafels. Wel een nadeel is dat hier geen stop aanwezig is, wij hebben deze zelf gecreëerd met een doek. Ook kan het schoner, 1 toilet was ontzettend vies en dat was pas schoon na 2 dagen.

Het personeel is ontzettend vriendelijk, denkt met je mee en reageert snel op vragen. Afvalbakken werden iedere dag geleegd toen wij er waren.

3 sterren voor de locatie, 5 sterren voor het personeel, 3 sterren voor de schoonmaak van het washok. Prijs was niet duur per nacht en daarin heb je waar voor je geld.

Staff at arrival were very condescending
Arrived early (10:30) and was told to wait outside in carpark for over an hour, even though our site was empty I tried to explain was early due to illnesss and needing to set up so I could sleep off a migraine, but she wasn’t interested in what I had to say, staff member asked if I had ever stayed in caravan parks before, when I said I had, she told me I should know the rules, spent a very uncomfortable time in the hot sun in the car waiting
We always come here, clean amenities, swimming pool, cabins available well kept grounds.

Checkin is easy, got the message from the reception before we got there. The map shows clear directions.
We booked unpowered camp site, price is very reasonable. I liked the facility is very clean, from the toilet, shower and kitchen. We have everything we need. Very quiet. Well maintained, nice spot

Great location near our traveling route and close to a wonderful shopping mall, hardware store and good price fuel - lovely large grassy site, very flat, lovely and roomy. Staff were very friendly and helpful. Great pool on site. We had a very comfortable stay here.
Clean a friendly park
Good facilities ,nice gardens👍lots of birdlife 🐦🐦🐦, can be noisy @ times as next 2 the Bruce highway but pricing $ is very reasonable,not much traffic overnight
An aging but clean park. Our powered site was a drive through on grass. Absolutely no complaints from us.

Stars are for the price as $25 for a powered site is cheap. But you get what you pay for. It's right on Bruce Hwy, so trucks and traffic ALL day and ALL night! Plenty of amenities but they need maintenance. Toilet block roof had rain pouring in, the floors very wet and when I had a shower all my clothes and toiletries bag got soaked, partly from the shower as there are no shower curtains but also from the leaking roof! I mentioned it to a staff member and he said it's been like that for 5 years (omg), he said the owners don't want to spend any money.
The park is not a"holiday park", workers and other people are obviously living there full time and take up the fridge and cooking space.
No wifi, despite being advertised as having free wifi, receptionist says it hasn't worked for a long time.
On the positive, the showers were hot and strong, bins were emptied daily, and the camp kitchen always had detergent, sponges and clean tea towels. The furniture though is old and very grotty, I didn't like sitting there.
We would not stay here again, for an extra $10 per night there's better options.

Great caravan park. Good sized sites even for big rigs. Clean amenities, hot showers with great water pressure. Nice pool. In a good location a short 5-10 min drive to the city, the strand & magnetic island ferry. 2 minutes to the Fairfield shopping complex.

Centrally located just off the A1. Easy 5 min drive to the city, the strand & the magnetic island ferry. A 2 minute drive to the Fairfield shopping complex. Check in is easy. Caravan Sites are a good size even for big rigs. Large clean amenities, hot showers with excellent water pressure. Nice pool for those hot days.
Poor
Really nice park. Amenities clean. And the park is quiet.
Nice and quiet. Clean amenities.
Great clean facilities laundry campers kitchen showers all as advertised
Quiet and relaxing

🌴 A Hidden Gem Just Outside Townsville. I had an absolutely delightful stay at BIG4 Townsville Gateway Holiday Park. From the get-go, the staff were friendly, helpful, and made check-in a breeze. Backing in my 13.5-meter rig was stress-free thanks to the generous site space, always a win when you're towing a big setup and not a "hot-shot" backer.
The facilities were spotless and clearly well looked after, and the park's peaceful setting, (backing onto a serene little stream) added a lovely touch of nature to the experience. The pool - let’s just say I spent more than a few blissful hours in there soaking up the sunshine and winding down.
Yes, you’re near the Bruce Highway, so there’s a light hum of road life in the background, but nothing that interrupted myrelaxation. In fact, being just 10 minutes from Townsville meant I had the best of both worlds, convenience and calm.
Highly recommend this park to fellow travellers. It’s comfortable, well-priced, and just the kind of spot that makes you want to extend your stay, which I did.

Sehr nettes Personal, wir durften abends einchecken weil wir kein Stellplatz gefunden haben, sie haben alles was man braucht und alles ist sauber

Wir waren 2 Nächte da
Great park, lovely grassy sites, well maintained, value for money. Loved our stay here.

Really helpful staff who work all day keeping the grounds and amenities clean and tidy.  There are lots of different types of caravan sites to choose from ( shaded, full sun, grass, slab), and they're all level.  The budget pet friendly cabins are clean, tidy and have everything you need.

Door knob locks do not work, was broken into like it was nothing, with tge door knob locked tge door still opened from the outside. I will not stay here again. Chased them out and kept my partner safe thank god but not security on the cabins
Nice clean rooms and very spacious sites for caravans.
Really good value for money and the location is just outside Townsville so it is a quiet spot to rest and relax.

Ne pas se fier aux photos , cabine studio vieille, pas entretenue, sale. Moisissures sur les rideaux. Rouille au sol. Robinetterie qui fait un gros bruit. pleins de moucherons (morts et vivants).
Un véritable  taudis, le pire hébergement que j'ai pu avoir en Australie et j'en ai fait beaucoup.
Avec ma femme nous n’avions jamais vu une cabine aussi vieille et salle , insectes à l’intérieur mauvaise odeur et j’en passe l’hygiène 0 . passez votre chemin c’est un conseil

Die Dame an der Rezeption war sehr nett hatte telefonisch Kontakt aufgenommen da wir später abreisen .
Der Camping wird glaube nicht nur von Touristen genutzt.
Der sanitär Bereich ist sehr alt und nicht sehr gepflegt . Die Küche war sauber und ok .
Leider keine Stimmung auf dem Camping . Dieser liegt auch am Highway das heißt man sieht und hört die Autos .
Zum Schreck habe ich eine Ratte gesehen. Zum durchreisen ist es ok aber sonst eher nicht für länger gedacht .

The room was dirty, especially the floors and the counters dusty, it also had items still in the room from a previous stay. There was hair in the drain in the bathroom. The studio room are quite run down. I would not recommend staying here. Manager was not easy to deal with he left a spray bottle & cloth in our room to clean up the mess ourselves.

Checked in in the evening and was instantly met with an angry bald man who didn’t identify himself telling us to keep it down as we tried to park at our site. Bathrooms and kitchen areas were filthy and unkempt, Google maps couldn’t even direct us correctly to the campsite. Disappointed with this as I have stayed at other Big4 locations and they have been held to a much higher standard than this.
Rooms are tiny. Not worth 250 dollars a night. It's a scam. Terrible location as it is a major flood zone.

The only positive was our cabin was new modern and reasonably clean, this should not be classed as a Big 4 and not family friendly, only has a basic pool we were very disappointed, the wifi didn’t reach our cabin which wasn’t very far from the office, and felt this was very overpriced for what it offered.

Only one way into the hoilday park and after the floods the road was closed. Pool was down cause of the floods so was inconvenience with a toddler. They did upgrade our cabin and it was spacious and clean.
Lovely place to stay we are staying here on beteeen getting another rental
Great location big shopping centre just couple mins of driving. Swimming pool is good

Absolutely disgusting, walked into our room on 02/01/25 to find mould in the aircons and on the seals of the doors. Watermarks all over the ceiling and walls, paint peeling also on the walls, room full of moisture absorbers, sheets and blankets were also disgusting with stains and food stuck to them. To make matters even worse i walked out of the bedroom to find my 2 year old son eating part of a old sandwich he had found under the cushions on the couch. Obviously we were not going to stay after the state of this room. After leaving we were told a manager would contact us shortly for a refund (which never happened and I had to chase them up) then only to be told that the room was not dirty (have photos of the room to prove it was absolutely disgraceful) and we were only entitled to 75% of our money back because one of the kids touched the blanket on the bed and that they would have to re-wash that bed (in my opinion we had been in the room so all the linen and towels should have been washed before the next quests anyway). Would not recommend anyone to stay here, absolutely disgusting would give it 0 stars if it was a option.

The studio I stayed in was clean, cool and relaxing. Perfect stay for 2 people and possibly 2 children. Bathroom was clean and area felt cosy. Even in the humidity the room cooled down perfectly for a comfortable stay. Definitely stay there again.

Great little stay! Definitely family friendly if you are looking at unwinding, but a bit out of the way, if you are looking at being close to city, hard to get in to, lucky we had gps as we had to go through like a little suberb to get to entrance. Parking was very tight so we parked behind our cabin not sure if we were allowed. Driving around had me  going into a little panic attack.
Some of the doors don't close properly here. Decent place though.

We have stayed at this park many years ago a lot of upgrades have been done staff very friendly and welcoming nothing to much trouble lots of shade large sites for those who need them the gardens all being upgraded a lovely park to stay in and will come back too in the future. Carole and John
Outdated amenities. The showers a leaking a lot and there are a lot of insects and gecko’s. The campkitchen and the laundry room are nice. A LOT of noise from the highway.

The park is large, green, and well-maintained. The restrooms are spacious and clean. There is plenty of space in the park when you're camping or there with your caravan. We only found it unfortunate that there wasn't WiFi coverage throughout the campsite. We only had good WiFi coverage in the building next to the reception. It would be really great if this WiFi could cover the entire campsite. Also, the toilet seats were a bit dirty.
We only stayed one night, and overall, it went well !
Awesome park, glad you like puppy dogs, unfortunately some people don't pick up after them.
Very clean, friendly staff and best of all large spots for big vans. Good rates.
Old and tired. Clean. In expensive

Thanks great quiet stay secure no drama. Cold pool big sites clean good amenaties great showers. Met new managers they will be great for the place.
Awesome next to highway but can't hear it. No shops close best get items first.
Courtesy bus to local pub.
Lovely place to stay a few nights. Good facilities, clean and quiet.
The park was clean and tidy thoroughly enjoyed our stay we will be back again.

Good park.  Uncovered site.  Good amenities with hot showers.  Good location out of town but on the Bruce highway so vehicle noise was all night.  Good location to Fairfield shops with full range of services.

Staff are lovely and sites are spacious but the facilities are old and don't work the best. Only one cooking area, location is quite far from town with no local shops but worst was being next to the freeway and all the cars/bikes night racing :(
Lovely spot just off the highway,  nice and quiet.   Amenities were clean and tidy.

There is nowhere to walk to all needed to drive.
When the park filled up the toilet and shower block quickly became dirty with people leaving rubbish anywhere.
Friendly service, good price, good location, great stay thankyou

Lovely Staff, very friendly and accommodating. Easy to get to very clean and tidy. We came at very busy time and park fully booked, there was plenty of room and amenities were keep clean and tidy. Well done

Nice and spacious and great facilities.  Toilets and showers are a bit dated but very clean.

Close to the freeway so a little bit noisy but easy access to get around.

Shopping centre close by with everything you need. Not far from mtb trails if that's your thing.
Was at first daunted by the masses of curlews and highway but there was no concerns - noise was light and curlews made no noise oddly. Sites are large amenities clean and not too far out of town.

Staff and management were extremely kind and helpful when I needed to extend my stay because of vehicle issues. They recommended several trustworthy local mechanics. Amenities are spotless and spacious, including a lovely recreation room with sofas, books, a TV and other entertainment options. The unpowered sites are large and comfortable, with some beautiful birds visiting periodically. I would definitely stay here again!

I was in an unpowered site. Staff and management were extremely kind and helpful when I needed to extend my stay because of vehicle issues. They recommended several trustworthy local mechanics. Amenities are spotless and spacious, including a lovely recreation room with sofas, books, a TV and other entertainment options. The unpowered sites are large and comfortable, with some beautiful birds visiting periodically. I would definitely stay here again!

Below average accommodation
Below average response from management

Vote with your feet

Stayed 3 nights in our Caravan
Great Caravan Park, good size camp/Caravan sites,clean Amenities, great location and best of all amazing staff
Chris and Adele Mackie

Happy with the decent size of the grass site that was given to us.
It’s close to the places we wanted to see.
Management is accomodating to a request we asked on our last day.
We will come back if we are coming this way again.
Great park, and it's a good location, but amenities need more care

Very average service. Park Manager is rude, very defensive and not willing to be of much assistance. Not willing to honour a discount claiming it is an ‘online-only’ promotion, even though the terms do not state this. Maybe she was just having a bad day. Either way, we will happily never return.||Also be sure to wash the dishes before you use anything as you are relying on the previous guest to have actually cleaned them properly for you. Anywhere that makes guests clean dishes should have a dishwasher to ensure they are sufficiently sanitised.

The park caters for everyone and anyone.
Great stay.
Great place to visit great location and very friendly staff the park is well set out 👌👌
What a beautiful spot to stay for a visit.
The older cabins could do with an up grade.
A Lovely Peaceful Park to stay in while visiting Townsville!
Nice park lot's  of room  friendly staff and  people
Great sites and very dog friendly

Park is groot, groen en netjes onderhouden. Sanitaire voorzieningen zijn groot en schoon. Er is voldoende ruimte op het park wanneer je er kampeert of staat met je caravan. Wij vonden het alleen jammer dat er geen wifi bereik was over de hele camping. We hadden alleen voor in het gebouw naast de receptie alleen goed bereik van wifi. Het zou echt top zijn als dit ober de gehele camping kan komen. En de stoelen bij de wasruimtes waren een beetje erg vies. Daarnaast was er ook geen keuken aanwezig met bijv een kookplaat, gelukkig hadden we zelf een gaspitje bij. Misschien is het leuk als dit er kan komen jn de toekomst?
Clean quiet & well kept place to stay overnight.

Great CP, lots of shade 10 minutes to City and the strand very well priced compared to others in Townsville. Enjoyed our 5 night stay . We had to cut it short due to caravan issues they were gracious and gave us a 2 day refund. We were very greatful 🙏 ❤️

Overall the caravan park was nice, good location because I fish the creek it backs up on but the owner has to be one of the rudest people I’ve ever met. Accused us of trying to break into houses when we were looking for cane toads (we where up from Victoria) told us the permanent residence will bash us and have permission to shoot us for walking around the caravan park, on our first day she walked up to us and demanded we tell her the number of our cabin before she even said hello. On the whole not a bad park but that owner is a proper piece of work and needs to check herself. Will not be returning.
Great stay helpfully staff

Although it was hidden away The cabin was good, the bed and pillows were comfortable the staff was good, it was nice and quiet and relaxing after being out all day.  |The facilities were good. I would recommend the place if you’re looking for a quiet place to stay in Townsville.

I've been a long term tenant in this caravan Park for some 7and a half years I've seen a few different managers in this time and Deborah and Peter the current management for the last couple of years have worked tirelessly to improve the park and are totally committed to making people feel welcome and go out of their way so people enjoy their stay I'm writing this review because I feel they aren't appreciated and sometimes get nasty comments there are always people you can't please or nothing is good enough for them but be assured the park is a pleasure to live in or stay in just want the management to get a fair go.!!!

I rarely do reviews on places I visit but I will most definitely be doing it on this place!!! First of all EXTREMELY!!!!! POOR!! Customer service. Secondly!!! Me and my partner decided to take a weeknd away to Townsville with our 2 dogs.
We stumbled across the BIG4 holiday park. It seemed convenient because it was pet friendly! WELL atleast it says it is on its site! Let me tell you now. Worse experience EVER had while travelling with our girls, so …. We arrived at the cabin , checked in … unpacked everything etc then took a rest … next morning come and we were very rudely awoken by the receptionist telling us our dogs have to get out of the cabin and that we MUST!!! Pay a cleaning fee of $200 on the spot because our dogs slept inside or we had to leave. No verbal warning just $200 to be paid. Please tell me how this is fair. This was our first time here , on the site it says PET FRIENDLY??? Like WHAT THE FAARRK!!! Then the husband came over telling us that we should have told them that we had dogs??? But what for??? Why should have we mentioned our dogs when it says PET FRIENDLY ???? In all honesty we feel we have been ripped right off of our own money. Believe me when I say these ain’t my last words. I will be taking further action and giving bad reviews on all platforms. Disgusting customer service from receptionist and her husband and definitely DO NOT recommend this place to anyone. Also our cabin had dust and dirty towels!!!

Note to everyone: DONT WASTE YOUR MONEY HERE !!! Take it where u would actually get treated equally. This place doesn’t even deserve 1 star. Filthy !!!!!

It's not quite kid friendly. There is a pool, but it is deep. The rooms are dated and could do with an update, but overall a lovely weekend. Service was brilliant, could not fault at all from booking to check out 👌
Great service very friendly and accomadating. Great price. Will definitely be back.
Nice quiet location with clean and tidy amenities. Friendly and helpful staff
Very friendly staff and well maintained grounds
I had a great time nice and quite everyone were friendly it was great I enjoyed my stay there

Great place to stay, very clean and comfortable. Excellent customers service from all staff and the mangers Deb and Pete are extremely welcoming and helpful. Would strongly recommend for a Townsville stop over or stay.
Nice location, close to city

For many years we have towed our van to Townsville and stayed in Gateway Holiday Park. Always a pleasure to return annually to this well-run Park and interact with the friendly staff who keep a tight rein on any inappropriate behavior cheers Brad Darlene

Due to unforseen circumstances, hubby and I have just spent 2 weeks here. We rarely stay in caravan parks because they seem so cramped. This park has plenty of space, we had a grassed site with power and water and had plenty of room. The bathrooms were kept spotlessly clean. Plenty of hot water for showers, with good pressure. We loved the pool area and used it daily. It was kept spotlessly clean. The staff were all extremely helpful and very friendly. Washing machines were excellent value ($4 a load) and there was plenty of clothesline space to hang out our washing. There are also driers if you need them. I am very happy to highly recommend this lovely, friendly park. Gerry and Michael McMaster
Room a bit small, staff helpful and friendly
Very friendly and great location. Close to shops and town

I don’t often bother to review, but we were really disappointed in the cabin we stayed in at this park. It was extremely overpriced at close to $200 night and It was nothing like the pictures. I think the owners could be a little more transparent with the description and or photos online. If you value basic hygiene and cleanliness, avoid the older cabins at this park.

Spoke with the gentleman about problems we had with other carvan parks and told him we had a soft floor camper when we booked we asked to be near a toilet and shower. yes, I could  have gone up and asked for a change of site, so there was no 3 inche slab in the middle of the camper, which made it hard to peg camper down due to high winds

Well located near shopping centre, fuel etc. Easy access off Bruce Hwy and not too far from centre of Townsville.  Nice grassed sites, some with concrete slabs, some all grass. Check in staff very pleasant and amenities very good. Generally quiet, but traffic noise does start to build on the highway early morning. We would stay again if travelling through.
Great staff, lovely shaded spot.. thanks, guys. I'll be back
Well maintained and clean amenities, very friendly staff.

The pet friendly cabin was a let down. Someone clearly had been smoking in this cabin, smoke stains on the ceiling, had the aircon running all night and the strongest smell of cigarette blew out it. Cigarette butts all around the outside of the cabin including the ashtray on the porch had ash left in it. Previous guest's maccas icecream left in the freezer. Only 2 towels for 5 guests. $25 cleaning fee if you don't clean and put away your dishes. $230 for one night.

Next to the highway but not too noisy. Slept in a tent and it was great. Checked in after hours was easy as well. Toilets and showers were clean and perfect.
Thank you

Powered Big Rig site. Spacious and level, plenty of sun. No wifi down back of park but good reception.
Shopping 10 minutes away, central Townsville 15. Amenities clean.

Wir waren mit zwei Familien (insgesamt 4 Kindern) hier für 3 Nächte. Unsere Plätze waren groß und sauber und wir konnten uns ohne Probleme so hinstellen, dass wir die beiden Camper gegenüber stellen konnten. Die Amenities waren in Summe in Ordnung, vielleicht nicht mehr die neuesten, aber vollkommen ausreichend und es gab nichts zu meckern. Einzig die CampKitchen war für die Größe des Platzes zu klein.
Away from city but like that great site near amenities would love some more shade but apart from that a very good part liked it so much we've stayed twice this month

If you are happy to be out of town (15 minute drive to cbd) this is a really good park. People here could not be more helpful. Try to get a grass area furtherest from the road but its quiet at night anyway.
Very friendly, amenities were always clean. Location to shopping centres excellent

Great service. Booked our RAM and caravan into the “big rig” section. The caravan park is very well spaced out for all types of caravans and campers etc. Good facilities and it was a pleasant and quiet stay over last weekend. Thanks.

Caravan stay Nice park Some sites with concrete slabs Some sites small to average other sites large with plenty space. Grounds clean and mostly well maintained. Amenities 2 blocks, very clean And pretty central to all sites. Walkways between sites to ablutions so not annoying other guests. Pet friendly. Plenty birdlife. Swimming pool good condition. It would be a Good idea to include recycling bins near rubbish bins only a thought. TV reception and phone reception good. TV room/lounge next to office For first time visitors would have been good to include street map to get around. About 4-6 kilometres from Cowboy stadium and City
The staff were very accomodating, and the amenities were clean and maintained.  We will definitely stay here again.
Handy, suiting our short stay perfectly. Customer service was exceptional.
Good location, clean amenities although i really dislike the "find a spot" style of camping when paying to stay in resorts and would much rather designated sites
Good Caravan site and great service from staff. The only issue is the location of the park which is around 11km outside of Townsville city. Otherwise; it was a great stay!

Friendly people who were very accommodating when we had to change our bookings after we arrived. Would definitely recommend this park to fellow caravaners. We will be staying here again. The nightly cost is quite reasonable as well.
Beautiful park we visit every year . Very neat and tidy great welcoming service.  Thankyou ZOIE AND THE TEAM 😁😁👍👍🍺🍺
Great park, very clean & staff are so friendly. Thanks few another great visit to Townsville.

My wife and I called gateway on Saturday hoping to obtain a position which we did on a very busy weekend. Nothing was a problem to management and in fact Debra went above and beyond to assist us. Park was very clean and tidy. Location great. Highly recommend.
Caravan site was good

Really well run. The managers are friendly and efficient.

Facilities are well kept and clean.

The location is exactly as described on their website. It’s an easy trip to all of Townsville experiences.

I personally would prefer to be closer to the heart of the city so I can walk to nightlife. I knew that wasn’t what I was booking so cannot fault the location.
Great park! Old facilities but clean! Well placed park bit noisy! But easy accessto Bruce hwy with van!
Very nice place and service was great 👍
Found a good site for us with no notice friendly professional staff good clean facilities.

Location is excellent!
It's pet friendly
The birds here are incredibly noisy near the unpowered sites wouldn't recommend if you are a light sleeper to stay here as the birds party at night here!
This caravan park unfortunately doesn't accommodate for young children there is only a swimming pool, no parks inside but there is a small park around the corner between Edith street & Forbes street, Cluden

You definitely need to book at least two weeks in advance if going peak season i.e school holidays long weekends as they are busy and booked our!

Loved it here staff lovely friendly & helpful , whole park has got a nice feel, amenities spotless , laundry great
Will ask for a creek grass site next time
The location was hard to find, the rooms were disguisting, as the one I stayed in had a mouldy shower. Disgusting.

Units are ok, but for $120 a night, you only get fresh linen, every 4 days, no sugar, no tea or coffee, not even any bowls for cereal, the air conditioner constantly stops, manually have to restart it over & over again, it's abit stingy for the money, compared to a motel room for the same money.

Although a bit pricey for an unpowered site, we found the facilities clean and the staff were amazing. Their customer service was outstanding. We had booked a few nights as our car had broken down but the car got fixed sooner than expected and they had so issues in refunding us for the night we didn’t stay. Thank you Deb, Amanda and the rest of the team.

Rooms clean enough but very old.  Mould growing outside of shower basin and shower head held on with gaffer tape. Couch was an absolute joke.  Had to put my camp chair in there to sit comfortably. All seating in that particular unit was very uncomfortable and old.  As for the price $180 a night is a ridiculous charge for this type of quality.  Not happy and won’t be back
Great park about 10 minutes out of town, friendly and helpful staff. Amenities were clean.

Needs luck of paint in amenities
Lot of freeway noise

We first stayed here in 2016 & found the park to be quite comfortable but this will be the last time as the facilities are dirty & run down, tiles missing in showers, garbage bins overflowing with rubbish, sites needing maintenance, broken annex slabs, broken concrete edging near camp kitchen, the steps at waste point are an accident waiting to happen & what appeared to be an overall attitude of it doesn't really matter. When the rain storm arrived the toilet roof leaked & the method of solving the issue was to place slippery floor signs out. Overall the park is a disgrace & requires urgent management attention, how it stays part of Big4 is beyond my comprehension. Again a Total Disgrace & won't be back.
Run down park. Hard to believe it is a big 4
Very good park
Lots of road noise at night , powered site feel a bit jammed in but nice big slabs.
Great caravan park
lovely friendly atmosphere
Great stay Tks Peter & your friendly & helpful staff.
Really nice resort with lovely people, is next to the main road but it's not too loud, lots of different birds around which is really interesting to see.
We had a great stay. Staff always happy to assist with a welcoming smile.

Fabulous staff at the desk who actually answer the phone and are super helpful with checking you in and picking a spot.  The amenities are plentiful with hot showers and big cubicles.  Friendly vibe in the park.  About 15 min uber to the ferries.  There is a bit of road noise, but we were up the front....I'm sure up the back will be quieter....but it's not loud anyway.......would deffs stay again

Recommended by a friend who had stayed with their dog and was happy with their experiences.  Unfortunately this was not the case for me.   The unit was not up to the price that I paid.   There was rust stains from the furniture on the floor.   The toilet fan was very noisy.
The worst of all was the infestation of small ants that we discovered in the morning.
Easy access, clean & tidy facilities & friendly staff thankyou
Traveling in a caravan
Nice location and in a quite area, from Darwin Northern Territory and will be recommending it for families travelling
Service and location, Brillant, can't rate highly enough.
Nice clean and tidy park, good for a stopover.
